sections.label: 1. Call the regular meeting to order. 7:00 P.M.

5. Initial general public comment period (A maximum of three (3) minutes per speaker for any city matters not requiring a public hearing. The speakers who have registered with the city clerk’s office (703-385-7935) prior to 5:00 p.m. the day of the meeti
7. Consideration of Appointments to Boards, Commissions, and Advisory Committees.

9. Second general public comment period (a maximum of three (3) minutes per speaker for any city matters not requiring a public hearing – limited to speakers who did not speak under initial general public comment period).
11. Recess the regular meeting to go into a work session.
16. Council Comments and Committee reports out (if needed).
